---
title: "Hi, I'm Bansi Khachar"
---

::::: {.columns style="display: flex; align-items: center; padding-left: 2rem;"}
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/IMG_7286%202-2.jpg){.rounded-circle style="border-radius: 60%; width: 150px; height: 160px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 0.25rem;"}
From funnel analysis to geofencing attribution, I bring together data, strategy, and curiosity to build marketing that actually connects with people.
:::
:::::

## About Me

I've always been more interested in the 'why' behind the numbers than the numbers themselves. What makes someone click? What makes them leave? What makes a campaign land — or fall flat? Those questions are what pulled me into marketing analytics, and they're still what drive me every day. 

I grew up in Ahmedabad, India, studied business and marketing, then moved to California to pursue a [MS in Digital Marketing and Analytics]{.highlight} at Cal Poly Pomona. That journey — across continents, cultures, and disciplines — gave me something that data alone can't teach: a genuine appreciation for how differently people think, behave, and make decisions.

Today, I work at the intersection of data and human behavior. Whether I'm analyzing funnel drop-offs in Google Analytics, building attribution models with SQL and BigQuery, or designing surveys that ask the right questions — I'm always asking the same thing: why does this number look the way it does? And more importantly — what do we do about it?

When I'm not deep in dashboards, you'll find me traveling — exploring new cities across the US and internationally, absorbing new cultures and perspectives. It keeps me grounded in something marketing can't afford to forget: real people live very different lives, and the best strategies are built with that in mind.

## Let's Connect

Good work starts with good conversations. Let's have one.

You can [email me](mailto:bansikhachar@gmail.com) or connect on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bansikhachar29/).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
